capability_profile.notes: Top-down thrust movement (zero-g). Walls constrain motion. Survival objective; pellets are optional collectible sensors.

common_failures: Do not lower minimum_acceptance_tier for simple known tasks just to pass validation.
Keep capability_profile controls honest; no teleporting or direct object mutation.
Tier 5 patterns must be physically solved by check_objective(), not just progress-verified.
generation_guidance: Reuse this objective/capability profile shape when the prompt semantics match.
Do not use validator controls outside capability_profile['allowed_controls'].
Expose progress metrics: survival_time, required_survival_seconds, was_hit, empowered_time_left, min_distance_to_nearest_ghost, pellets_collected_fraction.

objective_profile.objective_description: Survive for 8 seconds in a Pac-Man style corridor loop while avoiding moving ghost hazards (power pellets grant temporary safety).
objective_profile.success_predicate: agent remains unhit by hazards for required duration

summary: Survive for 8 seconds in a Pac-Man style corridor loop while avoiding moving ghost hazards (power pellets grant temporary safety). Validated as solved_verified with movement=thrust_2d, gravity=zero_g.

physics_relations.intent_summary: Create a top-down Pac-Man-style maze world where the player-controlled agent navigates corridors to collect pellets while avoiding moving ghost hazards.

relations.repair: Create dynamic hazards with recurring/staggered motion and enough clearance for visible travel.
Leave fair dodge lanes and avoid unavoidable starting contact.

validator_strategy.repair_unit: failed relation, not failed task template
validator_strategy.template_policy: helpers are optional constructors; relations are the conceptual source of truth

world_context.movement_model: Force-driven top-down movement with strong linear damping; collision-based navigation constrained by maze walls; optional gentle grid-snapping behavior is allowed but not required
world_context.rationale: Pac-Man is inherently a zero-gravity top-down maze chase; the core physical meaning is constrained corridor motion, collectible items, and moving hazards
world_context.support_model: No platforms; navigation occurs in open space bounded by static wall colliders forming corridors
world_context.theme: Classic arcade Pac-Man maze with pellets, power pellets, and roaming ghosts

verification.reason: Code-level objective satisfied during post-subgoal grace validation.
